reason: Code review checklist: compilation, formatting, clippy, tests, deny; error handling (thiserror vs anyhow); test coverage requirements
Verify dependency direction follows layers (ir ← engine ← control ← binaries); no circular deps; workspace dependency inheritance used
Dependency management: latest-version policy for uuid; workspace = true usage; Cargo.lock committed
Check Request/Response types not duplicated across shirohad and sctl (should be in shiroha-control); shared state pattern not duplicated
Commit message format and cadence for multi-crate changes
